title: Chain 1/8: Morning Drop-off
scene: 早上送孩子去托儿所。（对话链：亲子）

turns.en: Good morning! Did she sleep well last night?

turns.cn: 还不错，中午可能需要午睡。
turns.en: Pretty well. She might need a nap around noon.
Has she had breakfast?

turns.cn: 吃过了，奶瓶在包里，三点左右喝。
turns.en: Yes. The bottle is in the bag, around three o'clock.

turns.cn: 对花生过敏对吧？我们会注意。
turns.en: Allergic to peanuts, right? We'll watch for that.

turns.cn: 对，EpiPen 在侧袋。五点来接。
turns.en: Yes. EpiPen is in the side pocket. I'll pick her up at five.

title: Chain 2/8: Call from Daycare
scene: 上午托儿所打电话说孩子发烧。（对话链：亲子）

turns.cn: 您好，宝宝有点发烧，三十八点一。
turns.en: Hi, she has a slight fever, a hundred point six.

turns.cn: 我请一小时假过来，需要带什么？
turns.en: I'll take an hour off and come. Should I bring anything?
Bring a jacket. She's in the rest room.
I'll be there in about twenty minutes.
Okay. We'll stay with her.

title: Chain 3/8: Pediatrician Visit
scene: 你带孩子看儿科医生。（对话链：亲子）

turns.en: What's going on with your child?

turns.cn: 发烧两天了，三十八点三度。
turns.en: Fever for two days, about a hundred point nine.
Any cough? How's her appetite?
A little cough. She doesn't want to eat much.

turns.cn: 耳朵有点红，可能是耳部感染。
turns.en: Her ears are a bit red. Could be an ear infection.
Will she need antibiotics?

turns.cn: 开一种儿童口服液，一天两次。
turns.en: I'll prescribe a liquid. Twice a day.

title: Chain 4/8: Pick Up from School
scene: 孩子退烧后上学，你去接他放学。（对话链：亲子）

turns.cn: 您好，今天小明表现很好。
turns.en: Hi. Tommy had a great day today.
Thank you! Is there much homework?

turns.cn: 一页数学题，周五有拼写测验。
turns.en: One page of math. There's a spelling test on Friday.

turns.cn: 好的，我们会复习。明天带体育服吗？
turns.en: Okay, we'll review. Does he need gym clothes tomorrow?
Gym is on Wednesday.

turns.cn: 明白了，小明，跟老师说再见。
turns.en: Got it. Tommy, say goodbye to your teacher.

title: Chain 5/8: Homework Time
scene: 回家后你陪孩子做作业。（对话链：亲子）

turns.cn: 先做数学，拼写等会儿复习。
turns.en: Math first. We'll review spelling later.
I don't get this one.
Read the problem. Circle the numbers.
Oh, I need to add them!
Right. Check your work when you're done.

title: Chain 6/8: Parent-Teacher Meeting
scene: 你参加孩子的家长会。（对话链：亲子）

turns.cn: 感谢您来，孩子数学进步很大。
turns.en: Thanks for coming. He's improved a lot in math.

turns.cn: 在家我们也多练，有什么建议吗？
turns.en: We practice at home too. Any suggestions?

turns.cn: 阅读可以再加强，每天二十分钟。
turns.en: Reading could use a boost. Twenty minutes a day.

turns.cn: 他在班上和同学相处怎么样？
turns.en: How does he get along with classmates?

turns.cn: 很友善，有时上课有点分心。
turns.en: Very friendly. Sometimes a bit distracted in class.

turns.cn: 我们会和他谈谈，谢谢老师。
turns.en: We'll talk to him about it. Thank you.

title: Chain 7/8: Kids Sports Practice
scene: 周六早上你送孩子去足球训练。（对话链：亲子）

turns.cn: 今天九点训练，带水了吗？
turns.en: Practice at nine. Did he bring water?
Yes, and he's wearing shin guards.

turns.cn: 训练一小时，十点半来接。
turns.en: One hour. Pick up at ten thirty.
If it rains, is it indoors?
Yes, the gym. We'll text if we switch.
Okay. Thanks, coach.

title: Chain 8/8: Bedtime Routine
scene: 晚上你给孩子读睡前故事。（对话链：亲子）

turns.en: One more page, please!
Last page, then sleep.
Can we go to the park tomorrow?
If homework is done.
Okay. Good night, Dad.
Good night. Sweet dreams.
